summary: Tested mining session and referral levels functionality in PREVIEW environment. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed mining session is active with correct plan-based rate (225.1/hour for Elite plan), and referral page shows correct data (Total: 6, Active: 4, Bonus: +35%). The reported issues appear to be PRODUCTION-SPECIFIC and not reproducible in preview.
action_items: PRODUCTION INVESTIGATION NEEDED: User reports issues only in production, not preview. Check production database for different data formats in referred_by field
Check production cache (Redis) for stale mining status data
Verify production user's mining_session_end is not expired
Use /api/referrals/{uid}/debug-referred-by endpoint in production to diagnose referral counting issues
critical_code_review_comments: Mining.js correctly uses miningData.mining_rate_per_hour || miningData.mining_rate || 1.0 - the 1.0 is only a fallback if API returns no rate
ReferralsEnhanced.js has proper debug logging at line 339-344 which shows correct data in preview
Backend get_multi_level_referrals() uses aggressive search checking UID, referral_code, email, and name - this should handle different referred_by formats
check_user_active_status() correctly checks mining_active flag, session_end, bonus collection, and game activity
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user with Elite subscription and 6 referrals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview environment is fully functional. User reports issues ONLY in production. The debug endpoint /api/referrals/{uid}/debug-referred-by can help diagnose production issues. Mining rate formula: Day × ((BaseRate × UserMultiplier) + ReferralBonus). Elite plan has 3x multiplier.

Mining session start.details: Session starts correctly, returns session_active=true, remaining_hours=24

Mining session persistence.details: Session stays active, doesn't auto-pause in preview

Collect rewards functionality.details: Claim works, returns session_reset data for UI update

Referral levels API.details: Returns all 5 levels with correct counts (total=6, active=4)

production_vs_preview_analysis.issue: User reports issues ONLY in production, preview works correctly
possible_causes: Production database has different referred_by field formats (UID vs referral_code vs email)
Production Redis cache has stale mining status data
Production user's mining session has actually expired
Production has different user data than preview
recommended_actions: Run /api/referrals/{uid}/debug-referred-by in production to check referred_by formats
Clear Redis cache for affected user: mining_status:{uid}, mining_rate:{uid}
Compare production vs preview database for the affected user
